# Construction Tenant Overlay Kit

## Summary
Maps the construction operations pack into a Procore, SharePoint, and Teams stack for project-scoped pilot and early production use.

## Extracted Preview
> Ruh.ai V1 Tenant Overlay Kit
> Construction Project Operations - Procore + SharePoint + Teams
> Deployment-ready overlay for one contractor, one trust boundary, and repeatable project operations workflows
> 
> VERSION 0.1.0
> PACK REF construction-project-operations@1.0.0
> PRIMARY USE Pilot + first production overlay
> DATE 2026-03-08
> 
> Executive snapshot This overlay kit binds the reusable Construction Project Operations Pack to a contractor stack where Procore is the official project record, SharePoint stores durable documents and generated outputs, and Microsoft Teams is the collaboration and approval surface. The overlay is designed for general contractors and larger specialty contractors that already operate one project at a time through structured PMIS and document systems but still spend too much staff time on routing, document assembly, draft preparation, follow-up, and weekly reporting. The recommended first activation slice is intake and routing, RFI lifecycle, submittal lifecycle, and meeting-action sync.
> 
> Figure 1. The overlay binds one reusable pack to one contractor stack and one trust boundary.
> 1. Purpose, scope, and design choices
> This document is the deployment companion to the Construction Project Operations reference pack. It translates the horizontal pack into a concrete tenant-specific configuration pattern for contractors running Procore, SharePoint, and Teams. The kit defines how canonical construction objects are mapped, which employees are enabled, where official records live, what approval rules apply, and what must be true before the overlay can be promoted...
